e20-co523-C-Lite-Interpreter.title: C Lite Interpreter
e20-co523-C-Lite-Interpreter.description: An interpreter for C-Lite, a simplified  subset of the C programming language. The primary objective of the project is to demonstrate  a clear understanding of the program translation process from source code to execution.

e20-co523-C_LITE-Interpreter.title: C_LITE Interpreter
e20-co523-C_LITE-Interpreter.description: A Python-based interpreter 'C-Lite' — a simplified subset of the C programming language — developed as part of 'CO523 – Programming Languages' at the University of Peradeniya.

e20-co523-Mini-C-Interpreter.title: Mini C Interpreter
e20-co523-Mini-C-Interpreter.description: A C-Lite interpreter implemented in Python — featuring a Lexer, Recursive-Descent Parser, and AST-based Evaluator.
